shortDescription: Income-generating duplex in Humewood-Cedarvale with 5 bedrooms across two self-contained units.
fullDescription: Welcome to 88 Hillcrest Drive in the vibrant Humewood-Cedarvale neighbourhood. This income-producing duplex features two self-contained units, each with its own entrance and utilities. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. All 5 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
